A.text: ruptures, allowing the gas to escape freely

B.text: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside

C.text: dissolves and mixes with the gas

D.text: is pulled inward toward the center

parsed.answer_value: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside
parsed.rationale: The outer shell is semi-transparent and appears to be expanding, but it does not rupture or dissolve. The gas remains inside the shell, indicating that the shell expands while maintaining its integrity.
